question: What is the feature type name of feature AirCon?
gold_sql: SELECT T2.feature_type_name FROM Other_Available_Features AS T1 JOIN Ref_Feature_Types AS T2 ON T1.feature_type_code  =  T2.feature_type_code WHERE T1.feature_name  =  "AirCon"
predicted_sql: SELECT T2.attr_518a48_category_identifier FROM other_available_features AS T1 JOIN ref_feature_types AS T2 ON T1.attr_518a48_category_symbol = T2.attr_518a48_category_symbol WHERE T1.attr_518a48_identifier = 'AirCon'
raw_response: SELECT T2.attr_518a48_category_identifier FROM other_available_features AS T1 JOIN ref_feature_types AS T2 ON T1.attr_518a48_category_symbol = T2.attr_518a48_category_symbol WHERE T1.attr_518a48_identifier = 'AirCon'
